title: Figure 1 in Molecular characterization of a potential receptor of Eimeria acervulina microneme protein 3 from chicken duodenal epithelial cells
author: Zhang, Zhenchao

description: Figure 1. Construction and restriction endonuclease analysis of recombinant bait plasmid pDHB1–EaMIC3. (A) M: DL5000 marker; 1: The product of EaMIC3 PCR. (B) M: DL5000 marker; 1: pDHB1–EaMIC3 digested by Sfi I; 2: pDHB1–EaMIC3.
